claim: Project Telos has a fourteenth-wave Lean replay rung package that installs/binds Lean by explicit path, compiles a bounded integer algebraic cancellation theorem file for the Navier-Stokes periodic skew-symmetry packet, refreshes formal-PDE and Lean/prover arXiv source leads, demotes those leads to SOURCE_LEAD_ONLY, updates website and official-copy surfaces, and keeps the continuous periodic integration-by-parts theorem NOT_REPLAYED and the parent Navier-Stokes problem UNVERIFIABLE.
scope: Local fourteenth-wave documentation and receipt package only. This is a Lean replay for integer algebraic cancellation lemmas, not continuous periodic integration by parts, not smooth-field formalization, not PDE correctness, not physical-fluid validation, not source-body review of arXiv papers, not exhaustive literature coverage, not global Lean PATH certification, not native BuildLang relation-invariant support, and not an accepted publication.

checks.name: Lean source exists
checks.evidence: PeriodicCancellationPreflight.lean exists under the skew-symmetry packet formal/lean directory.

checks.name: continuous theorem boundary preserved
checks.evidence: Lean replay receipt and publication surfaces mark continuous periodic integration by parts as NOT_REPLAYED.

checks.name: source demotion gate exists
checks.evidence: source-lead-demotion-gate records 20 retained rows, 16 unique IDs, and SOURCE_LEAD_ONLY verdict.

checks.name: publication surfaces updated
checks.evidence: Website copy and official-copy scaffold distinguish LEAN_REPLAY_MATCH from NOT_REPLAYED.

checks.name: content queue boundaries exist
checks.evidence: FOURTEENTH-WAVE-CONTENT-QUEUE-2026-07-02.md forbids Navier-Stokes, continuous PDE replay, source truth, exhaustive coverage, native relation receipt, and PATH overclaims.

boundary: This packet teaches a bounded local package claim. It does not prove continuous periodic integration by parts, Navier-Stokes, PDE correctness, physical-fluid validity, paper truth, global PATH availability, native relation-invariant support, or publication acceptance.
